endpoint.label: cosmetic ingredient use
endpoint.comment: A data item recording the regulated cosmetic use of a substance in the EU CosIng database: its declared cosmetic function(s) and any restriction/prohibition under the Annexes of Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009.

II.label: Annex II - substances prohibited in cosmetic products

III.label: Annex III - substances restricted in cosmetic products

IV.label: Annex IV - colorants allowed in cosmetic products

V.label: Annex V - preservatives allowed in cosmetic products

VI.label: Annex VI - UV filters allowed in cosmetic products

I.label: Annex I - illustrative list by category of cosmetic products
